deep_dive.title: Formalizing and falsifying causal pathways of rare events
deep_dive.abstract: Building on recent formalizations of root cause analysis for rare events (``outliers'') in structural equation models, we propose a formal definition of a causal pathway and discuss its testable implications. We identify conditions under which these implications depend only on a causal abstraction defined by the pathway of rare events, rather than on the full causal graph of the underlying system. Accordingly, we introduce an abstraction of causal structure to pathways of rare events that bridges simple verbal causal explanations and detailed causal modeling.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: formal definition and testing of causal pathways in structural equation models
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 在结构方程模型中形式化定义和检验因果路径
deep_dive.llm_evidence: 在结构方程模型中形式化定义和检验因果路径
deep_dive.canonical_evidence: 在结构方程模型中形式化定义和检验因果路径
deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: Provides formal definitions and testable implications for causal pathways of rare events, bridging verbal explanations and causal modeling.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 该论文针对罕见事件，形式化定义了因果路径的概念并讨论其可检验含义。提出路径抽象方法，使得检验仅依赖于路径而非完整因果图。工作连接了简洁的因果解释和详细因果建模，为因果推断提供了理论工具。
